allow:
Bash(gh pr create --base main --title "Update IPCCH model code and analysis" --body "$\(cat <<''EOF''
## Summary
- Add comprehensive IPCCH forecasting model notebooks and analysis
- Include feature importance analysis with SHAP visualizations
- Add regional vs global model comparison experiments
- Include Cleanlab label quality analysis framework
- Add country-level performance analysis
- Include error rate mapping infrastructure
- Add supporting Python modules and configuration files

## Key Changes
- Multiple forecasting scenarios \(main, ablation, cleanlab, rolling, phase-specific\)
- Feature importance notebooks with visualizations
- Regional model comparison \(6 and 9 regions\)
- Error rate mapping at point and polygon levels
- Country performance disaggregation tools

## Data Management
- Excluded large CSV files \(using Parquet format where available\)
- Updated .gitignore for better data file management
- Removed large images and PDF outputs from version control

Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)
EOF
\)")
